title: Harden multi-agent validation workflow
goal: Make repository validation safer and more practical for concurrent multi-agent execution.

steps.text: Identify workflow bottlenecks and collision points for concurrent validation runs.
Apply minimal workflow and documentation updates to support parallel-safe validation.
Verify command-path consistency and contributor guidance.
Run validation checks and summarize remaining operational risks.

acceptanceCriteria: Validation workflow is safe for concurrent use
Contributor guidance is clear and consistent
Scope remains limited to workflow surfaces
No unrelated implementation changes were introduced
